summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Red Team Automation Framework v5.0. All 17 backend API tests pass (100%). All frontend features verified working including Dashboard, Navigation (8 tabs), Targets, Chains, C2, AI, Config, Logs sections. Global config persists LHOST and auto-injects into Quick Payload Commands. Scans complete successfully with simulated tools.
passed_tests: GET /api/ - Health check returns version 5.0.0 with features
GET /api/config - Returns global operator config (listener_ip, listener_port, c2_protocol, operator_name, auto_lhost)
PUT /api/config - Updates and persists config to MongoDB
GET /api/mitre/tactics - Returns 14 MITRE ATT&CK tactics
POST /api/scan/start - Starts scan and returns scan_id
GET /api/scan/{id}/status - Returns scan progress and completes with attack_tree
GET /api/scan/history - Returns scan history list
GET /api/chains - Returns 6 attack chains
GET /api/chains/{id} - Returns chain details with steps and actions
GET /api/c2/dashboard - Returns MSF and Sliver status (both OFFLINE in preview)
GET /api/msf/status - Returns MSF RPC status
GET /api/sliver/status - Returns Sliver C2 status
GET /api/metasploit/modules - Returns MSF modules list
GET /api/tools - Returns red team tools
GET /api/tactical/service-attacks - Returns service attack strategies
GET /api/tactical/vuln-exploits - Returns vulnerability exploit mappings
POST /api/scan/{id}/abort - Aborts running scan
Frontend - Dashboard loads with 4 metrics (Active Targets, Compromised, Sessions, Total Ops)
Frontend - MITRE ATT&CK Kill Chain shows 14 selectable phases
Frontend - Recent Operations shows scan history from backend
Frontend - All 8 navigation tabs work (Dashboard, Targets, Attack Graph, Chains, C2, AI, Config, Logs)
Frontend - Target input and ENGAGE button starts scan via POST /api/scan/start
Frontend - ABORT button appears during scan and aborts correctly
Frontend - Targets section: Add target button works
Frontend - Chains section: Shows 6 attack chains, click loads details with context inputs
Frontend - C2 section: Shows MSF and Sliver status panels (both OFFLINE in preview)
Frontend - AI section: Shows recommended exploits after scan completion
Frontend - Config section: Listener IP/Port inputs, Save Config button works
Frontend - Config auto-injects LHOST: Quick Payload Commands show correct IP/Port
Frontend - Logs section: Shows terminal output with 6 filter buttons (all, cmd, success, error, warning, info)
Frontend - Autonomous Mode toggle button works
Frontend - Sidebar shows LHOST status (green when configured, red when NOT SET)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features fully tested and working: 1) Dashboard with 4 metrics and MITRE phases. 2) Navigation with 8 tabs. 3) Targets section with add/remove. 4) Chains section with 6 chains and context inputs. 5) C2 section with MSF/Sliver panels (OFFLINE in preview). 6) AI section with recommended exploits after scan. 7) Config section with LHOST/LPORT that auto-injects into Quick Payload Commands. 8) Logs section with filters. 9) Autonomous mode toggle. 10) Scan start/abort flow. Tools are simulated in preview (Kali tools not installed). Kimi AI returns 401 (no valid API key in preview). MSF/Sliver show OFFLINE (no local services).

ai_section.status: Working - Kimi returns 401 (no API key), recommended exploits show correctly

config_section.auto_inject: LHOST auto-injects into all Quick Payload Commands

scan_flow.completion: Scan completes in ~7 seconds with simulated tools

mocked_apis.note: Tools are simulated on preview server - Kali tools not installed. Kimi AI returns 401 (no valid API key). MSF/Sliver return OFFLINE (no local services). This is expected behavior for preview environment.
